title: Load Fields
text: Load Fields Load fields from the specified entity into the current DTD. Fields Field Name —names of fields belonging to the entity in the application model. Label —label of the field, as defined in the application model. How to To select or clear all fields, click the Select All icon beside the Field Name header. You cannot load fields if the entity element already has child field elements. For more information, see Working with DTDs . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
